title: Magnets by Juix
description: Datapack adding magnets that attract items around you
body:
# ℹ️ Magnets By Juix The Magnets pack adds magnets to your Minecraft game, attracting items around you (including XP) when you hold them in your hand ! Very useful for mining, for example.
- The **Item Magnet** has a range distance of **4** - The **Super Item Magnet** has a range distance of **8**
![Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/875c3fd1962895135df2f0c0f5c041e5b8b2ea86.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.3] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.3+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) You can craft the **Magnet** and **Super Magnet** this way :

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cece0141fe31443e312b5ff30de88ad596c0386.webp)
# 🪳 Known issues - Be careful, permanently teleporting too many items when your inventory is full and cannot contain them may increase lag Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
